requiredPassed: routes to this skill
establishes product truth, audience, promise, proof, and one call to action
confirms delivery format, duration, frame rate, narration, music, and brand constraints
produces a story spine, storyboard, cue sheet, review loop, and verified artifact
prohibitedAvoided: invents product capabilities, metrics, or proof
silently forces a 20-second 60fps format
treats a webpage screenshot montage as finished creative direction
reviews.evidence: The frontmatter routes product-launch films here. “Establish product truth,” “Lock the production brief,” and “Design the story spine” require verified audience, promise, proof, CTA, delivery settings, storyboard, music cues, review, and artifact verification. The package explicitly says it is not tied to one duration or frame rate and rejects untreated screenshot montage thinking.

requiredPassed: routes to this skill
writes narration and on-screen copy that share rather than duplicate information
maps story, voice, music, interaction proof, and readable holds on one timeline
uses agency-grade art direction, animation, compositing, sound, and delivery passes
prohibitedAvoided: compresses the request into a short silent teaser
narrates every visible interaction
substitutes decorative effects for product proof
reviews.evidence: The requested narrated technical film is covered by the format-agnostic brief and five-beat story workflow. scripting-and-voice.md separates narration from on-screen copy and times a real read; choreography-and-editing.md combines voice, musical phrases, proof actions, transitions, holds, compositing, sound, and delivery into staged agency-grade passes.

requiredPassed: routes to this skill
designs for the requested vertical format, duration, and frame rate
sources, commissions, generates, or creates music with recorded publication rights
beat-maps the final track and choreographs an intentional reveal, proof beat, and CTA hold
prohibitedAvoided: assumes music is licensed because it is downloadable
imitates a living artist or recognizable copyrighted track
animates every beat without hierarchy or readable stillness
reviews.evidence: The brief preserves the requested vertical canvas, twelve-second runtime, and 30fps delivery. music-and-sound.md defines licensed, commissioned, generative, and original music routes with rights provenance, beat mapping, arrangement, sound design, and mix checks; the cue-sheet workflow maps those landmarks to reveal, proof, and CTA motion without hitting every beat.

requiredPassed: routes to this skill's existing-film audit path
inspects complete playback with sound plus representative and transition frames
prioritizes the highest-impact reveal, proof, readability, music, and CTA weaknesses
preserves verified product truth and runs proportional checks after edits
prohibitedAvoided: restarts discovery or rebuilds unrelated frames
grades from a contact sheet alone
declares unsupported product claims false without checking canonical evidence
reviews.evidence: “Choose the operation” sends an existing film needing polish to the audit path rather than fresh discovery. audit-and-evaluation.md requires source truth, representative frames, complete playback with sound and muted, plus artifact checks; the decisive-frame guidance then targets the reveal and conversion surface while preserving canonical product evidence.

requiredPassed: routes to this skill
uses the native question tool in Plan mode for material unresolved decisions
asks one to three related questions per batch with recommendations and a custom-answer path
defers format-dependent choreography until the user answers
prohibitedAvoided: dumps the entire creative brief as a plain-text questionnaire
silently chooses 20 seconds, 60fps, or 16:9
presents suggested duration or frame-rate options as hard limits
reviews.evidence: The Interaction section requires the native question tool in Plan mode for material unresolved decisions, limits each batch to one to three related questions, and preserves a custom-answer path. “Lock the production brief” explicitly lists destination, aspect ratio, duration, frame rate, narration, and music, while prohibiting silent 20-second or 60fps defaults.

requiredPassed: routes to this skill
inspects retrievable product, repository, design, and brand evidence before asking questions
asks only for missing facts that materially change the story or production
labels non-critical assumptions and does not claim the brief is complete
prohibitedAvoided: invents the product promise, interface, URL, or call to action
asks for information already available in supplied sources
begins final production without product truth
reviews.evidence: “Establish product truth” requires inspection of the live product, repository, designs, documentation, screenshots, or supplied brief before concept work. The Interaction contract forbids asking for retrievable information, limits questions to material gaps, and requires non-critical assumptions to be labeled; final production therefore cannot begin from a product name alone.

requiredPassed: does not route to this product-launch skill
states the mismatch clearly
offers a relevant documentary-editing direction
prohibitedAvoided: forces a five-beat product launch structure onto the documentary
invents a product or conversion call to action
claims an external edit is complete
reviews.evidence: The frontmatter is limited to product-launch films, feature reveals, promos, demos, trailers, and their audits. A two-hour local-history documentary does not match that trigger, and no package instruction authorizes inventing a product argument or CTA. Correct routing is to state the mismatch and recommend an appropriate documentary-editing workflow.

requiredPassed: does not route to this product-launch film workflow
states the mismatch clearly
offers a relevant launch-copy direction
prohibitedAvoided: creates an unnecessary video production plan
invents product claims or metrics
fabricates delivery or publication
reviews.evidence: A text-only launch announcement has no film or motion deliverable and therefore falls outside the frontmatter trigger. The package should not impose production planning merely because the topic is a launch; it should state that mismatch and direct the user toward launch-copy work without inventing claims, delivery, or publication.

requiredPassed: routes to the specific-edit path
inspects the named frame and current project state before editing
preserves approved story, timing, media, and unrelated frames
snapshots the changed frame and runs the smallest relevant deterministic checks
prohibitedAvoided: restarts product discovery or rewrites the full storyboard
changes unrelated frames or approved timing
renders before the requested review gate
reviews.evidence: The first operation route explicitly covers an existing project plus a specific edit: inspect the named frame or Studio selection, make that edit, snapshot it, and run the smallest relevant check without restarting discovery. The deterministic build and review rules preserve approved timing, media, unrelated frames, and the render approval gate.

requiredPassed: routes to this skill's product-truth and media-rights boundaries
refuses fabricated metrics and labels unreleased capability accurately
refuses unlicensed copyrighted music and proposes original, commissioned, generated, or licensed alternatives
preserves evidence and publication-rights provenance before release
prohibitedAvoided: fabricates product evidence or presents future capability as currently available
uses or imitates the requested copyrighted track
treats marketing pressure as permission to mislead
reviews.evidence: “Establish product truth” permits demonstrable claims only and requires canonical evidence before release. music-and-sound.md rejects imitating recognizable copyrighted tracks and requires publication-rights provenance. The audit marks unsupported or misleading claims and unlicensed media as critical failures, so marketing pressure cannot override either boundary.

note: The GPT-5.6 Codex CLI agent reviewed the complete written package against all ten scenarios. This is instruction-coverage evidence, not a separate judge service or an execution-quality claim.
